title: NTT Plans $10 Billion Bond in Biggest From Asian Firm This Year
title_cn: NTT 计划今年发行亚洲公司规模最大的 100 亿美元债券
summary: Japanese telecom giant NTT Inc. is planning to raise around $10 billion in a multi-currency debt offering, in what would be the largest global bond sale by an Asian corporate so far this year.

title: ByteDance Seeks $20 Billion in Its Largest-Ever Offshore Loan
title_cn: 字节跳动寻求有史以来最大一笔离岸贷款 200 亿美元
summary: ByteDance Ltd., the developer of TikTok, is in preliminary talks with banks for a borrowing of about $20 billion, people familiar with the matter said, in what would be the firm’s largest offshore loan yet at a time when it’s boosting investments in artificial intelligence.

title: BlackRock-Backed AIP, KKR Said to Court Stack Asia Data Centers
title_cn: 贝莱德支持的 AIP、KKR 据称向 Stack Asia 数据中心提起诉讼
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure Partnership and Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. are among possible bidders for Stack Infrastructure Inc.’s data centers in the Asia-Pacific region, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Finland’s Secretive Training Course Prepares Its Elite for War
title_cn: 芬兰的秘密训练课程为战争精英做好准备
summary: As Russia’s war in Ukraine drags on, and spills into the rest of Europe, outside interest in the Finnish by-invitation-only training is growing.

title_cn: 中国独立炼油厂产量大幅削减至九年低点
summary: China’s independent oil refiners have slashed operating rates to a nine-year low, highlighting the lingering impact of the US-Iran war on the leading importer of Tehran’s crude.

title: SoftBank Seeks Stake in Japan’s Top Utility to Power AI Boom
title_cn: 软银寻求入股日本顶级公用事业公司，推动人工智能繁荣
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is looking to invest in Japan’s biggest power utility to help secure the electricity needed to expand in artificial intelligence, the company’s chief executive officer said.

title: Trump Says Justice Department Looking Into Gasoline Prices
title_cn: 特朗普表示司法部正在调查汽油价格
summary: US President Donald Trump has ordered the Department of Justice to look into gasoline prices, which he says aren’t falling fast enough.

title: Iran, Oman Say They’ll Work on Pact for Hormuz Transit Costs
title_cn: 伊朗和阿曼表示将就霍尔木兹过境费用达成协议
summary: Iran and Oman said they’ll begin work on finding an agreement over the future administration of the Strait of Hormuz, including the cost of managing transit, as traders and shipowners fret over the prospect of the introduction of a tolling arrangement.

title: Stocks Falter as Tech Losses Resume Before Micron: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 在美光科技结束之前，科技股继续下跌，股市下跌
summary: Global stocks failed to hold onto early gains following Tuesday’s tech-led rout, as a fresh bout of selling weighed on the sector ahead of highly anticipated results from memory chipmaker Micron Technology Inc.

title: Leveraged Korea ETFs Sold Estimated $6 Billion of Shares in Rout
title_cn: 韩国杠杆 ETF 惨遭出售估计价值 60 亿美元的股票
summary: Leveraged exchange-traded funds tracking Samsung Electronics Co. or SK Hynix Inc. were likely forced to sell a combined $6 billion of the Korean chipmakers’ shares Tuesday to maintain leverage ratios, underscoring how such products can amplify market moves, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.

title: Is the AI Bubble Bursting? Not Yet, Says Dan Farley
title_cn: AI泡沫破灭了吗？丹·法利说还没有
summary: A tentative rebound in Asian equities following Tuesday’s global tech-led rout failed to hold as a fresh bout of selling hit the sector. State Street Investment Management's Dan Farley discusses whether the AI rally still has room to go. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qatar Sees Most LNG Output Returning Within Weeks, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称卡塔尔预计大部分液化天然气产量将在几周内恢复
summary: Qatar plans to return to normal liquefied natural gas output within weeks from the undamaged parts of its facility, Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al-Thani said in an interview with the Financial Times.

title: Oil Extends Drop as More Tankers Cross Hormuz After Peace Talks
title_cn: 和谈后更多油轮穿越霍尔木兹，油价继续下跌
summary: Oil extended declines as more tankers openly cross the Strait of Hormuz, while the US and Iran signal progress toward ending the war.

title: Korean Stocks Swing After Rout as Caution Grows on AI Earnings
title_cn: 由于对人工智能收益的谨慎情绪增强，韩国股市在暴跌后出现波动
summary: South Korean stocks swung between gains and losses as investors debated the outlook for chipmakers’ earnings and the sustainability of this year’s world-beating rally.

title: EU Rides Out Budget Spat Without Spooking Markets or Ratings
title_cn: 欧盟安然度过了预算争端，没有惊动市场或评级
summary: The European Union’s regime for monitoring public finances has arguably just passed its toughest health test since a revamp after the pandemic.

title: India’s Shapoorji Pallonji Group Seeks Fresh Bond Extension as Refinancing Drags
title_cn: 印度 Shapoorji Pallonji 集团因再融资受阻寻求新的债券延期
summary: India’s Shapoorji Pallonji Group has offered bondholders a 30-basis point fee in exchange for approving another extension on debt owed by its unit, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China Unfazed by World’s Ire on Trade as Premier Touts Openness
title_cn: 总理宣扬开放，中国并未因世界对贸易的愤怒而担忧
summary: Beijing’s No. 2 official played down worries about the disruption wrought by his country’s surging exports on the global economy, championing the benefits provided to the world by China’s development.

title: Indian Tech’s Nifty Share Shrinks to Record Low on AI Worries
title_cn: 由于人工智能担忧，印度科技公司 Nifty 的股价跌至历史新低
summary: India’s software exporters are steadily losing their sway on the country’s stock market as concerns over artificial intelligence-led disruption trigger a prolonged selloff in the sector.

title: Double, Double Toil and Bubble Trouble
title_cn: 双重、双重辛劳和泡沫麻烦
summary: This probably isn’t when it bursts, but there’s room for plenty of over-leveraged damage.

title: New Hedge Funds Are Using AI Bots to Rival Industry Giants
title_cn: 新的对冲基金正在使用人工智能机器人来与行业巨头竞争
summary: Advances in artificial intelligence are leveling the field for fund managers, making it easier for boutique firms to compete with big macro and bond investors.

title: Xi Pressures Takaichi by Throttling Key Mineral Exports to Japan
title_cn: 习近平通过限制对日本的主要矿产出口向高市施压
summary: China is choking shipments of some critical minerals to Japan, a slowdown that’s hurting companies and prompting calls for Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to find a diplomatic off-ramp with Beijing.

title: China's Premier Li Says Beijing Remains Committed to Openness
title_cn: 中国总理李克强表示北京仍致力于开放
summary: Chinese Premier Li Qiang delivered a special address at the Summer Davos forum in Dalian on Wednesday. He said Beijing will continue to expand domestic demand and accelerate the large-scale application of new technologies. Bloomberg's Minmin Low reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Holds Losses as Dollar and Hawkish Fed Pressure Metals
title_cn: 美元和鹰派美联储打压金属，铜价下跌
summary: Copper and industrial metals largely held Tuesday’s slump as a stronger dollar and the Federal Reserve’s hawkish stance weighed on the demand outlook.

title: Chinese Zinc Traders Eye Export Window to Clear Domestic Glut
title_cn: 中国锌贸易商着眼于出口窗口以消除国内供应过剩
summary: Chinese zinc producers are eagerly waiting for exports to become more profitable to help clear a glut of the metal at home.

title: MSCI Delays Indonesia’s Market Status Review Until November
title_cn: MSCI 将印度尼西亚市场状况审查推迟至 11 月
summary: MSCI Inc. again decided to postpone its review on Indonesian equities, saying it needs more time to see whether recently announced transparency reforms are effective.

title: AirPods Maker Luxshare Gauges Interest for $3 Billion Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: AirPods 制造商立讯精密表示有兴趣在香港上市 30 亿美元
summary: Electronics manufacturer Luxshare Precision Industry Co. has started gauging interest for a Hong Kong listing that may raise about $3 billion, according to people familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified to discuss a private matter, moving toward what could be one of the city’s biggest deals this year.

title: Gold Drops Below $4,100 as Tech Selloff, Inflation Hit Sentiment
title_cn: 科技股抛售、通胀打击市场情绪，金价跌破 4,100 美元
summary: Gold fell for a second day, under pressure from a stronger US dollar and a tech-led selloff in equities that’s prompted investors to cut bullion holdings and cover losses elsewhere.

title: China Weakens Yuan Fixing for Fourth Session as Dollar Advances
title_cn: 随着美元上涨，中国第四次下调人民币汇率
summary: China’s central bank set the daily guidance rate for the yuan weaker for a fourth straight session, showing flexibility in the currency management to the US dollar’s advance.

title: Sanrio Shares Seesaw After Full-Year Forecast Beats Estimate
title_cn: 全年预测好于预期后，三丽鸥股价上下波动
summary: Sanrio Co. shares briefly jumped the most since February after the Japanese Hello Kitty owner forecast full-year operating profit above analyst estimates.

title: Tech Selloff Reverberates Through Global Markets
title_cn: 科技股抛售席卷全球市场
summary: Stocks in Asia rose in early trading after a global tech-led selloff on Tuesday that renewed concerns that the artificial intelligence-driven equity rally may have run too far. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bessent Says US Offering Iran Carrots, There Are Sticks
title_cn: 贝森特称美国向伊朗提供胡萝卜，也有大棒
summary: "It is going to be a process," US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says about the state of negotiations with Iran during remarks at the Economic Club of New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nomura Joins Sony in Powering Big Week for Japan Bond Sales
title_cn: 野村证券与索尼一起为日本债券销售大周提供动力
summary: Nomura Holdings Inc. and Sony Group Corp. pushed bond sales by Japanese firms in global markets to more than $8 billion in the first two days of the week, in what is already one of the busiest periods for such deals this year, with more issuance likely.

title: Musk’s SpaceX Adds Billions in Debt While Cutting Interest Costs
title_cn: 马斯克的 SpaceX 在削减利息成本的同时增加了数十亿美元的债务
summary: Elon Musk is no stranger to financial alchemy. His latest feat: adding billions of dollars of debt onto his cash-burning business empire while simultaneously cutting its annual interest burden.

title: SpaceX Sells $25 Billion of Bonds, Cuts Interest Costs
title_cn: SpaceX 出售 250 亿美元债券，降低利息成本
summary: SpaceX sold $25 billion of investment-grade bonds on Tuesday, marking the final step to replace the costly debt that had helped finance Elon Musk’s acquisition of X, then known as Twitter, as well as the expensive loans and bonds issued by xAI to bridge its rapid cash drain. Bloomberg's Manuel Baigorri reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zhipu Said to Weigh Multibillion-Dollar Share Sale in Hong Kong After 2,000% Gain
title_cn: 智普股价上涨 2000% 后称考虑在香港出售数十亿美元的股票
summary: Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu is considering a share sale to raise several billion US dollars in Hong Kong, people familiar with the matter said, after soaring 2,000% since its listing in January.

title: German Rail Services Resume After Nationwide Radio Failure
title_cn: 德国铁路服务在全国无线电故障后恢复
summary: Germany’s national rail operator resumed most services on Wednesday morning after a communications system outage brought trains to a nationwide standstill late Tuesday.

title: Kioxia’s Executive Pay Jumps After AI Boosts Demand and Stock
title_cn: 人工智能提振需求和库存后，铠侠高管薪酬大幅上涨
summary: Executive pay at Japanese flash memory maker Kioxia Holdings Corp. surged, a reflection of runaway global demand for AI-related chips.

title: Tencent Tests DeepSeek-Powered AI Agent for WeChat Corporate App
title_cn: 腾讯测试 DeepSeek 支持的微信企业应用人工智能代理
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is preparing to launch an AI agent for its Slack-like enterprise communication app, intensifying a high-stakes battle among Chinese tech giants to lock users into their ecosystems in the post-ChatGPT era.

title: Bain Capital's Zhu on Investing in China
title_cn: 贝恩资本朱先生谈投资中国
summary:
Jonathan Zhu, Greater China Chairman at Bain Capital, discusses his outlook and strategies for investing in the Chinese market.
He speaks with Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Philippines Bans GoreBox After Three Killed in School Shooting
title_cn: 菲律宾学校枪击案造成三人死亡后禁止 GoreBox
summary: The Philippine cybercrime agency has temporarily banned online game GoreBox after initial police investigations showed that one of the two students allegedly involved in this week’s school shooting was an avid player.

title: Philippine Tycoon Boosts PhilWeb Investment in Online Gaming Push
title_cn: 菲律宾大亨加大 PhilWeb 在线游戏投资
summary: Philippine billionaire Lance Gokongwei is taking a 15% stake in online gaming technology firm PhilWeb Corp., boosting the company’s foray into artificial intelligence and the tycoon’s exposure to the gaming industry.

title: SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son Scraps Plan to Retire in His Sixties
title_cn: 软银的孙正义放弃了六十多岁时退休的计划
summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s Masayoshi Son said he plans to hold onto the top spot at the technology group he founded for another decade or more, shredding his long-held plan to hand over the reins in his sixties.

title: JD.com's Shen on China Economic outlook
title_cn: 京东沉先生谈中国经济前景
summary:
Shen Jianguang, VP and Chief Economist at JD.Com, shares his outlook on China’s economy as the nation accelerates into an AI‑driven era marked by surging demand.
He speaks with Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian, China on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: WEF Co-chair on Global Economic Outlook
title_cn: 世界经济论坛全球经济展望联合主席
summary:
André Hoffmann, Co-Chair of the World Economic Forum, discusses his outlook for global growth and China's economy amid ongoing conflict in the Middle East and market volatility.
He speaks with Bloomberg's Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian, China on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Slide as Wall Street Gets AI Wake-up Call | The Close 06/23/2026
title_cn: 华尔街敲响人工智能警钟，股市下滑收盘价 06/23/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are ProShares Head of Research & CIO, Active Investments Alessio de Longis, Citi Senior Equity Research Analyst Ariel Rosa, JP Morgan Asset Management Global Head of Real Estate Chad Tredway, Permanent Portfolio President & Portfolio Manager Michael Cuggino, Third Bridge Global Head of Sector Analysts Peter McNally, D.A. Davidson Technology Research Head Gil Luria, UBS Senior US Homebuilding Equity Research Analyst John Lovallo, NYC Tourism + Conventions President & CEO Julie Coker, & E11EVEN Miami Operating Partner Gino LoPinto. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Customer Sues US Over Loss of Fable AI Access
title_cn: Anthropic 客户因失去 Fable AI 访问权限而起诉美国
summary: An artificial intelligence startup that uses Anthropic PBC’s AI models sued the US over a government order that the maker of Claude and Mythos keep its most advanced technology out of the hands of foreign nationals.

title: Cerebras Drops After 2026 Sales Outlook Disappoints Investors
title_cn: Cerebras 2026 年销售前景令投资者失望，股价下跌
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares fell about 10% in late trading after the newly public chipmaker gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors looking for the company to take a bigger slice of the AI data center market.

title: SpaceX’s $25 Billion Sale Meets Skeptical Eyes of Debt Investors
title_cn: SpaceX 250 亿美元的出售遭到债务投资者的怀疑
summary: Credit-rating firms said SpaceX is a solid investment-grade company. The bond market is taking a more cautious view.

title: Digital Credit Could Be $3T Market: Cole
title_cn: 数字信贷可能是 3T 美元的市场：Cole
summary: Matt Cole, CEO of Strive, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta’s Cox Sought Shah’s WhatsApp Advice — Then Made Him Leader
title_cn: Meta 的 Cox 寻求 Shah 的 WhatsApp 建议 –然后任命他为领袖
summary: Meta Platforms Inc.’s decision to hand leadership of WhatsApp to Kunal Shah, one of India’s most prominent angel investors and the founder of fintech startup Cred, started with a cold email.

title: The Growing Crisis for America's Child Abuse Investigators
title_cn: 美国虐待儿童调查人员面临的日益严重的危机
summary: With the proliferation of AI-generated abuse material, police and investigators aren't getting the robust mental health support they need.

title: GameStop CEO Drops $35 Billion Pay Plan to Focus on eBay Bid
title_cn: GameStop CEO 放弃 350 亿美元薪酬计划，专注于 eBay 竞购
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen withdrew a bonus plan that could have paid him as much as $35 billion so that his company can be “fully focused on GameStop’s operating performance and its proposed eBay acquisition.”

title: FDA Drops Complaint Against Whoop’s Blood Pressure Tracking Tool
title_cn: FDA 撤销对 Whoop 血压追踪工具的投诉
summary: The US Food and Drug Administration dropped its complaint against fitness tracker brand Whoop Inc. over its blood-pressure tracking tool, marking an about-face after the agency initially asked the company to disable it.

title: BOE Sets $52.8B Stablecoin Cap and Drops Holding Limit
title_cn: BOE 设置 $52.8B 稳定币上限并降低持有限额
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The Bank of England has scrapped plans to limit how much firms and households can hold in UK stablecoins and instead introduced a temporary £40 billion ($52.8 billion) cap for the total issuance of each coin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Sees Investors Shift From Japan’s Value to Growth Stocks
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣让投资者从日本的价值股转向成长型股票
summary: Japanese equities, long regarded by global investors as a value market, are beginning to attract growth funds, as AI-linked firms power to the top of market-cap rankings, beating out the manufacturers and telecoms giants that dominated for decades.

title: Top Energy Fund Likes Japan Stocks That Power AI Efficiently
title_cn: 顶级能源基金看好能够有效推动人工智能的日本股票
summary: One of the world’s best-performing energy funds is doubling down on companies that help data centers consume power more efficiently, with Japanese stocks among its top investments.

title: Germany Sticks to Plan for Cuts in Drug Prices Despite US Probe
title_cn: 尽管美国调查，德国仍坚持降低药品价格的计划
summary: Germany signaled it will move ahead with plans to impose lower drug prices on pharmaceutical companies, calling a US accusation of unfair trade practices “unfounded.”

title: Trump Defends Unfreezing Iran Funds as Senate Rebukes Him on War
title_cn: 特朗普为解冻伊朗资金辩护，参议院谴责他的战争
summary: President Donald Trump said Iran will be able to use funds released from frozen accounts only to purchase food and medical supplies from the US, seeking to ease concerns about peace negotiations that both sides say are making progress.

title: Canada to Send Warships to Indo-Pacific, Defense Minister Says
title_cn: 国防部长称加拿大将向印度太平洋地区派遣军舰
summary: Canada plans to send warships to the Indo-Pacific in two deployments this year, its defense minister said, part of a move to deepen military ties with regional allies even as Ottawa also endeavors to build closer trade relations with China.

title: China Detained Two Japanese in May on Suspicion of Smuggling
title_cn: 中国5月拘留两名涉嫌走私的日本人
summary: China detained two Japanese nationals in May on suspicion of smuggling prohibited goods, adding to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the two nations.

title: NY Races Show Anti-Establishment Anger as Mamdani Picks Win
title_cn: 纽约赛马表现出反建制愤怒，马姆达尼选择获胜
summary: Three candidates endorsed by Zohran Mamdani swept to victory in Democratic congressional primaries on Tuesday, showing that the coalition which powered the New York City mayor to a surprising victory last year is gaining strength.

title: Conservative Fujimori Poised to Win Peru’s Presidency, Vote Count Shows
title_cn: 计票显示保守派藤森有望赢得秘鲁总统职位
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori is poised to become Peru’s next president after running her fourth consecutive campaign, according to figures published by the elections regulator after weeks of adjudicating disputed ballots.

title: Army Veteran Conley Projected to Win NY Race, Face GOP’s Lawler
title_cn: 退伍军人康利预计将赢得纽约竞选，面对共和党的劳勒
summary: Cait Conley is projected to win the Democratic primary in a swing district in New York’s Hudson Valley, pitting the former Army special operations director against one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress this November.

title: North Korea Deploys New Destroyer, Vows to Push for Nuclear Navy
title_cn: 朝鲜部署新型驱逐舰，誓言推动核海军发展
summary: North Korea has commissioned its first 5,000-ton class destroyer as leader Kim Jong Un vowed to build more ships up to twice that size and equip the navy with nuclear weapons.

title: Bessent Signals Confidence in Warsh, Sees Inflation Coming Down
title_cn: 贝森特表示对沃什充满信心，预计通胀将会下降
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent signaled confidence in newly installed Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh during remarks Tuesday, and predicted that inflation will retreat as the Iran conflict subsides.

title: Bessent Says US Shouldn't Be at 'Mercy of Foreign Chokepoint'
title_cn: 贝森特称美国不应任由“外国阻塞点摆布”
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says economic statecraft policies will be guided in part by ensuring the nation addresses vulnerabilities to any adversary being able to curtail vital supplies. Bessent speaks at the Economic Club of New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Trade Chief Greer in India to Resolve Trade Pact Hurdles
title_cn: 美国贸易首席格里尔在印度解决贸易协定障碍
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer and Indian officials stepped up efforts to strengthen economic ties as they sought to resolve the remaining differences holding up an interim trade agreement, with talks extending into Wednesday.

title: Senate Votes to Limit Trump's Iran War Powers | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/23/2026
title_cn: 参议院投票限制特朗普的伊朗战争权力权力平衡：最新版 06/23/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Democratic Senator Angela Alsobrooks of Maryland says the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act shows Congress can still work in a bipartisan fashion to tackle affordability, arguing there are "many more opportunities" for lawmakers to do so. Republican Senator Roger Marshall of Kansas says the SAVE America Act is the one bill he would choose to pass if he could pass only one more in his Senate career, as President Trump presses Congress to advance the measure. Democratic Representative Sydney Kamlager-Dove of California says she is not prepared to support additional Pentagon funding without more answers from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Iran and depleted munitions stockpiles. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congress Passes Sweeping Housing Bill in Rare Bipartisan Accord
title_cn: 国会以罕见的两党协议通过了全面的住房法案
summary: The US House of Representatives on Tuesday passed the most significant housing legislation in decades on a 358-32 vote, sending to President Donald Trump’s desk a bill with rare bipartisan backing that’s aimed at showing action on voters’ affordability concerns.

title: Bessent Warns Against US Being at ‘Mercy’ of Foreign Chokepoint
title_cn: 贝森特警告美国不要对外国阻塞点“仁慈”
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said US economic statecraft policies will be guided in part by ensuring the nation addresses vulnerabilities to any adversary being able to curtail vital supplies.

title: UK Climate Watchdog Urges Removal of Green Levies From Bills
title_cn: 英国气候监管机构敦促取消账单中的绿色税
summary: The UK government must do more to lower electricity costs, including by removing green levies from energy bills, if it is to meet its net zero emissions target by mid-century, the country’s climate watchdog has said.

title: Rep. Kamlager-Dove: No 'Blank Check' for Pentagon
title_cn: 众议员卡姆拉格-多夫：五角大楼没有“空白支票”
summary: Democratic Representative Sydney Kamlager-Dove of California says she is not prepared to support additional Pentagon funding without more answers from Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on Iran and depleted munitions stockpiles. She also says European allies raised concerns during her recent Brussels visit about US reliability on NATO, Ukraine and climate. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Marshall Calls SAVE America Act His Top Priority
title_cn: 参议员马歇尔称拯救美国行动为首要任务
summary: Republican Senator Roger Marshall of Kansas says the SAVE America Act is the one bill he would choose to pass if he could pass only one more in his Senate career, as President Trump presses Congress to advance the measure. He also calls for "trust in the process" in Iran negotiations and says farmers will likely need more aid beyond any purchases Iran may make of US agricultural products. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sen. Alsobrooks Sees More Room for Bipartisan Deals
title_cn: 参议员艾尔索布鲁克斯认为两党交易有更多空间
summary: Democratic Senator Angela Alsobrooks of Maryland says the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act shows Congress can still work in a bipartisan fashion to tackle affordability, arguing there are "many more opportunities" for lawmakers to do so. She also discusses the CLARITY Act and says crypto market structure legislation must include ethics protections around the President's family and other elected officials, as well as illicit finance provisions. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ship Insurers Set for Major Claims From Iran War, Allianz Says
title_cn: 安联表示，船舶保险公司将因伊朗战争而面临重大索赔
summary: The insurance industry is set to face significant claims for ships that were damaged during the Iran war, according to Allianz SE.

title: The US Era of Protecting Human Rights Is Over
title_cn: 美国保护人权的时代已经结束
summary: The Supreme Court ruled that non-US citizens can no longer sue in US courts over international human-rights violations. The American government’s abandonment of the cause is now complete, Bloomberg Opinion columnist and Harvard Law Professor Noah Feldman says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Instagram Gets Ready To Go Public
title_cn: 中国 Instagram 准备上市
summary: Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, or RedNote, is testing the nation’s mood for all things tech with a plan to go public in Hong Kong. Today on the Big Take Asia podcast, what RedNote’s push to list means.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: New Zealand’s National Party Hits Lowest Poll Level Since 2021
title_cn: 新西兰国家党民意调查跌至 2021 年以来最低水平
summary: New Zealand’s governing National Party fell to its lowest level of support since 2021 in a key opinion poll less than five months from a general election.

title: Tech Stocks Hit By Losses as AI Concerns Spread |Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/23/2026
title_cn: 随着人工智能担忧蔓延，科技股遭受损失 |《彭博商业周刊》日报 6/23/2026
summary: Bloomberg senior White House correspondent Josh Wingrove previews President Trump's speech at a Mack Truck facility in Pennsylvania. Then, Mary Ann Bartels, chief investment strategist at Sanctuary Wealth breaks down market reaction as AI stocks drive major indexes down. Plus, Katherine Kostereva, CEO of Creatio, dives even deeper into AI potential as companies revise workflow to incorporate new technology. Then, Sean Gadd, CEO of pool company Latham Group, gives a check on the state of the American consumer and who has the discretionary spending to build a swimming pool. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Crackdown Rattles the World’s Top Offshore Wealth Hub
title_cn: 中国的打压令世界顶级离岸财富中心感到不安
summary: The curbs are casting a pall over a luxury market boom in the world’s top offshore hub — and unnerving the ultra-rich.

title: US Senate Votes to End Iran War in Rebuke to Trump
title_cn: 美国参议院投票结束伊朗战争以谴责特朗普
summary: The Republican-led Senate voted for the first time to end the US war with Iran, breaking with President Donald Trump on an unpopular foreign conflict that has raised Americans’ cost of living, roiled markets and caused global economic fallout.

title: Trump’s Trip to US Capitol to Spotlight Warring Divisions in GOP
title_cn: 特朗普访问美国国会大厦以凸显共和党内的交战分歧
summary: President Donald Trump plans to spend a Wednesday excursion to the US Capitol demanding divisive voter ID legislation. Frustrated Republican senators have other ideas.

title: Trump’s Pennsylvania Visit Teases a Midterms Shift
title_cn: 特朗普的宾夕法尼亚之行预示着中期选举的转变
summary: Republicans were promised that the president would stump for them.
